external_services.service_name: Application for Late Registration of Birth
external_services.image: /assets/document_background/Application for Late Registration of Birth
external_services.type_of_transaction: G2C – Government to Citizens
external_services.who_may_avail: Parents, Document owner

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Negative Certificate of Birth – 1 original copy
Parents’ Marriage Certificate for legitimate child – 1 certified true copy
checklist_of_requirements.source: Philippine Statistics Authority or Civil Registrar’s Office where the marriage was registered

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Baptismal Certificate – 1 certified true copy
checklist_of_requirements.source: Church where the child was baptized

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Any government-issued ID
checklist_of_requirements.source: Any government agency (PSA, Comelec, LTO, PhilPost, GSIS, SSS, etc.)

steps.client_step: 1. Accomplish the information slip and submit requirements. For unmarried parents: Make sure to secure the Order of Payment that will be issued
steps.agency_action: 1.1. Verify the record and receive the requirements
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Aide VI (Lipa City Civil Registrar’s Office)

steps.client_step: 1. Accomplish the information slip and submit requirements. For unmarried parents: Make sure to secure the Order of Payment that will be issued
steps.agency_action: 1.2. Interview the applicant
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Aide IV (Lipa City Civil Registrar’s Office)

steps.client_step: 1. Accomplish the information slip and submit requirements. For unmarried parents: Make sure to secure the Order of Payment that will be issued
steps.agency_action: 1.3. For unmarried parents, issue Order of Payment
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Aide VI (Lipa City Civil Registrar’s Office)

steps.client_step: 2. Proceed to the Lipa City Treasurer’s Office and pay the corresponding amount. *Make sure to secure the Official Receipt that will be issued upon payment
steps.agency_action: 2. Receive payment and issue Official Receipt
steps.person_responsible: Revenue Collection Clerk II (Lipa City Treasurer’s Office)

steps.client_step: 3. Present the Official Receipt to the Lipa City Civil Registrar’s Office
steps.agency_action: 3.1. Issue claim stub indicating the date and time of release
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Aide VI (Lipa City Civil Registrar’s Office)

steps.client_step: 3. Present the Official Receipt to the Lipa City Civil Registrar’s Office
steps.agency_action: 3.2. Prepare Municipal Form (MF) No. 102
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Aide VI (Lipa City Civil Registrar’s Office)

steps.client_step: 3. Present the Official Receipt to the Lipa City Civil Registrar’s Office
steps.agency_action: 3.3. Prepare and post notice of application
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Aide VI (Lipa City Civil Registrar’s Office)

steps.client_step: 3. Present the Official Receipt to the Lipa City Civil Registrar’s Office
steps.agency_action: 3.4. Assign registry number and sign the document
steps.person_responsible: Registration Officer IV (Lipa City Civil Registrar’s Office)

steps.client_step: 4. Return on the given date of release and claim the birth certificate
steps.agency_action: 4. Release the birth certificate after 10 days of posting
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Aide IV (Lipa City Civil Registrar’s Office)

external_services.total_processing_time: 1 hour and 5 minutes with 10 days posting period

steps.agency_action: 1.3. Prepare Municipal Form (MF) No. 97

steps.client_step: 1. Accomplish the information slip and submit requirements
steps.agency_action: 1.4. Issue claim stub indicating the date and time of release

steps.agency_action: 1.5. Prepare and post notice of application

steps.client_step: 1. Accomplish the information slip and submit requirements
steps.agency_action: 1.6. Assign registry number and sign the document

external_services.service_name: Application for Legitimation of Children under RA No. 9858
external_services.image: /assets/document_background/Application for Legitimation of Children under RA No. 9858
external_services.type_of_transaction: G2C – Government to Citizens
external_services.who_may_avail: Document owners, parents who were below marrying age during the conception of their children

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Birth certificate of the child for legitimation – 1 certified true copy
checklist_of_requirements.source: Lipa City Civil Registrar, Philippine Statistics Authority

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Parents’ marriage contract – 1 certified true copy
checklist_of_requirements.source: Lipa City Civil Registrar, Philippine Statistics Authority

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: CENOMAR of both parents – 1 original copy
Valid IDs of parents
checklist_of_requirements.source: Document owner, Any government agency (PSA, Comelec, LTO, PhilPost, GSIS, SSS, etc.)

steps.client_step: 1. Submit requirements for legitimation. *Make sure to secure the Order of Payment that will be issued
steps.agency_action: 1.1. Review and evaluate the submitted requirements and assign number at the legal instrument
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Assistant IV (Lipa City Civil Registrar’s Office)

steps.client_step: 1. Submit requirements for legitimation. *Make sure to secure the Order of Payment that will be issued
steps.agency_action: 1.2. Issue Order of Payment
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Assistant IV (Lipa City Civil Registrar’s Office)

steps.client_step: 2. Present the Order of Payment and pay the corresponding fee at the Lipa City Treasurer’s Office. *Make sure to secure the Official Receipt that will be issued upon payment
steps.agency_action: 2. Receive payment and issue Official Receipt
steps.person_responsible: Revenue Collection Clerk II (Lipa City Treasurer’s Office)

steps.client_step: 3. Present the Official Receipt to the Lipa City Civil Registrar’s Office and claim a copy of the birth certificate with annotation
steps.agency_action: 3.1. Review and cause annotation
steps.person_responsible: Registration Officer IV (Lipa City Civil Registrar’s Office)

steps.client_step: 3. Present the Official Receipt to the Lipa City Civil Registrar’s Office and claim a copy of the birth certificate with annotation
steps.agency_action: 3.2. Release a copy of the birth certificate with annotation
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Assistant IV (Lipa City Civil Registrar’s Office)

external_services.service_name: Application for Marriage License
external_services.image: /assets/document_background/Application for Marriage License
external_services.type_of_transaction: G2C – Government to Citizens
external_services.who_may_avail: Male and female, 18 years old and above, resident of Lipa City (at least 1 of the contracting parties)

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Birth certificate of contracting parties – 1 certified true copy each
checklist_of_requirements.source: Lipa City Civil Registrar’s Office, Philippine Statistics Authority

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Certificate of No Marriage (CENOMAR) of contracting parties – 1 original copy each
Advice/ Consent of Parents for applicants below 25 years of age
Any government issued ID of applicants and parents – 1 photocopy each
checklist_of_requirements.source: Any government agency (PSA, Comelec, LTO, PhilPost, GSIS, SSS, etc.)

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Legal Capacity to Marry, if foreign applicant – 1 original copy
checklist_of_requirements.source: Embassy where the foreign applicant is a citizen at the time of marriage application

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Judicial Decree of Annulment of Marriage, for applicant with first marriage – 1 original copy
checklist_of_requirements.source: Court where the decision granting annulment of marriage was rendered

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Death Certificate of death spouse for applicant with first marriage – 1 certified true copy

steps.client_step: 1. Personally submit the requirements for evaluation
steps.agency_action: 1.1. Receive requirements and interview the applicants
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Assistant IV / Administrative Aide IV (Lipa City Civil Registrar’s Office)

steps.client_step: 1. Personally submit the requirements for evaluation
steps.agency_action: 1.2. Prepare application form and other pertinent documents
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Assistant IV / Administrative Aide IV (Lipa City Civil Registrar’s Office)

steps.client_step: 2. Sign the application forms in front of the Lipa City Civil Registrar together with the parents. *Make sure to secure the Order of Payment that will be issued
steps.agency_action: 2.1. Issue Order of Payment
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Assistant IV (Lipa City Civil Registrar’s Office)

steps.client_step: 3. Present the Order of Payment and pay the corresponding fee at the Lipa City Treasurer’s Office. *Make sure to secure the Official Receipt that will be issued upon payment
steps.agency_action: 3.1. Receive payment and issue Official Receipt
steps.person_responsible: Revenue Collection Clerk II (Lipa City Treasurer’s Office)

steps.client_step: 4. Present the Official Receipt to the Lipa City Civil Registrar’s Office
steps.agency_action: 4.1. Receive the application and refer the engaged couple to the LSWD and CHO for counseling
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Assistant IV (Lipa City Civil Registrar’s Office)

steps.client_step: 4. Present the Official Receipt to the Lipa City Civil Registrar’s Office
steps.agency_action: 4.2. Prepare and post notice of application
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Assistant IV (Lipa City Civil Registrar’s Office)

steps.client_step: 4. Present the Official Receipt to the Lipa City Civil Registrar’s Office
steps.agency_action: 4.3. Check and sign the application
steps.person_responsible: Registration Officer IV (Lipa City Treasurer’s Office)

steps.client_step: 5. Claim the marriage license
steps.agency_action: 5.1. Release the marriage license after 10 days of posting
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Assistant IV (Lipa City Civil Registrar’s Office)

external_services.service_name: Petition for Change of Entries in the Birth Certificate (RA No. 10172)
external_services.image: /assets/document_background/Petition for Change of Entries in the Birth Certificate (RA No. 10172)
external_services.type_of_transaction: G2C – Government to Citizens
external_services.who_may_avail: Document owner, spouse, children, immediate family or authorized representative

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Birth Certificate, School records (Form 137), Baptismal certificate, NBI/Police Clearance
Medical records/certificate (for correction of sex)

steps.agency_action: 1.1. Check completeness and issue Order of Payment
steps.person_responsible: Registration Officer IV (Lipa City Civil Registrar’s Office)

steps.agency_action: 2.1. Receive payment and issue Official Receipt

steps.client_step: 5. Claim annotated birth certificate
steps.agency_action: 5.1. Release the annotated document
steps.person_responsible: Registration Officer IV (Lipa City Civil Registrar’s Office)

external_services.type_of_transaction: G2C – Government to Citizens
external_services.who_may_avail: All interested individuals

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Letter of request, Birth/Marriage/Death certificates, Baptismal/School records

steps.client_step: 1. Submit letter and requirements, secure Order of Payment
steps.agency_action: 1.1. Check completeness and evaluate documents
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Assistant IV (Lipa City Civil Registrar’s Office)

steps.client_step: 2. Pay fee at Treasurer’s Office
steps.agency_action: 2.1. Receive payment and issue Official Receipt
steps.person_responsible: Revenue Collection Clerk II (Lipa City Treasurer’s Office)

steps.client_step: 3. Present Official Receipt to Registrar
steps.agency_action: 3.1. Approve, annotate and process for endorsement
steps.person_responsible: Registration Officer IV (Lipa City Civil Registrar’s Office)

external_services.service_name: Request for Endorsement to PSA
external_services.image: /assets/document_background/Request for Endorsement to PSA
external_services.type_of_transaction: G2C – Government to Citizens, G2G – Government to Government
external_services.who_may_avail: Individuals with negative certification from PSA

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Negative certification (Birth/Marriage/Death), Certified copy from LCR
checklist_of_requirements.source: PSA, Lipa City Civil Registrar’s Office

steps.client_step: 1. Submit requirements and secure Order of Payment
steps.agency_action: 1.1. Check completeness and evaluate documents
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Aide IV (Lipa City Civil Registrar’s Office)

steps.client_step: 2. Pay fee at Treasurer’s Office
steps.agency_action: 2.1. Receive payment and issue Official Receipt
steps.person_responsible: Revenue Collection Clerk II (Lipa City Treasurer’s Office)

steps.client_step: 3. Present Official Receipt and wait for approval
steps.agency_action: 3.1. Process and approve endorsement
steps.person_responsible: Registration Officer IV (Lipa City Civil Registrar’s Office)

steps.client_step: 4. Claim the endorsement
steps.agency_action: 4.1. Release the endorsement
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Aide IV (Lipa City Civil Registrar’s Office)

external_services.service_name: Request for Inclusion of Entries in the Civil Registry Documents
external_services.image: /assets/document_background/Request for Inclusion of Entries in the Civil Registry Documents
external_services.type_of_transaction: G2C – Government to Citizens
external_services.who_may_avail: All interested individuals

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Birth/Marriage/Death certificate (PSA), Affidavit of Supplemental Report, Parents' Marriage cert

steps.client_step: 1. Submit requirements and secure Order of Payment
steps.agency_action: 1.1. Receive, verify and issue Order of Payment
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Assistant IV (Lipa City Civil Registrar’s Office)

steps.client_step: 2. Pay fee at Treasurer’s Office
steps.agency_action: 2.1. Receive payment and issue Official Receipt
steps.person_responsible: Revenue Collection Clerk II (Lipa City Treasurer’s Office)

steps.client_step: 3. Present Official Receipt and wait for annotated document
steps.agency_action: 3.1. Prepare forms and annotate documents
steps.person_responsible: Registration Officer IV (Lipa City Civil Registrar’s Office)

steps.client_step: 3. Present Official Receipt and wait for annotated document
steps.agency_action: 3.2. Prepare and issue annotated certificate
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Aide IV (Lipa City Civil Registrar’s Office)

external_services.service_name: Request for Piecemeal Submission of Civil Registry Documents to PSA
external_services.image: /assets/document_background/Request for Piecemeal Submission of Civil Registry Documents to PSA
external_services.type_of_transaction: G2C – Government to Citizens, G2G – Government to Government
external_services.who_may_avail: All interested individuals

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Negative Cert, Supporting docs, Marriage cert, Baptismal cert, ID, LCR copies
checklist_of_requirements.source: PSA, LCR Office, Parish, Government agencies

steps.client_step: 1. Submit requirements and secure Order of Payment
steps.agency_action: 1.1. Receive, verify and issue Order of Payment
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Aide IV (Lipa City Civil Registrar’s Office)

steps.client_step: 2. Pay fee at Treasurer’s Office
steps.agency_action: 2.1. Receive payment and issue Official Receipt
steps.person_responsible: Revenue Collection Clerk II (Lipa City Treasurer’s Office)

steps.client_step: 3. Present Official Receipt and claim endorsement
steps.agency_action: 3.1. Process document and approve endorsement
steps.person_responsible: Registration Officer IV (Lipa City Civil Registrar’s Office)

external_services.service_name: Request for Registration of Court Decrees and Orders
external_services.image: /assets/document_background/Request for Registration of Court Decrees and Orders
external_services.type_of_transaction: G2C – Government to Citizens, G2G – Government to Government
external_services.who_may_avail: Document owner, spouse, children, kin or authorized person

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Court Decree/Order, Certificate of Finality, Entry of Judgment, Certificate of Authenticity
checklist_of_requirements.source: Court where decision was rendered, Lipa City Civil Registrar’s Office

steps.client_step: 1. Submit requirements and secure Order of Payment
steps.agency_action: 1.1. Check completeness and request Authenticity from court
steps.person_responsible: Registration Officer II (Lipa City Civil Registrar’s Office)

steps.client_step: 1. Submit requirements and secure Order of Payment
steps.agency_action: 1.2. Review/approve registration and issue Order of Payment
steps.person_responsible: City Civil Registrar (Lipa City Civil Registrar’s Office)

steps.client_step: 2. Pay fee at Treasurer’s Office
steps.agency_action: 2.1. Receive payment and issue Official Receipt
steps.person_responsible: Revenue Collection Clerk II (Lipa City Treasurer’s Office)

steps.client_step: 3. Present Official Receipt to Registrar
steps.agency_action: 3.1. Register decree, cause annotation and endorse to PSA
steps.person_responsible: Registration Officer IV / II (Lipa City Civil Registrar’s Office)

external_services.total_fees: P202.00 for birth / P400.00 for marriage
